info.description: EXBanka Banking Microservices API Gateway. All endpoints are served under /api/v3 — v1 and v2 have been retired (plan E, 2026-04-27). Future versions (v4+) will be added as separate explicit router files with no transparent fallback. See api-gateway/internal/router/router_versioning.md.
info.title: EXBanka API

get.summary: Actuary performance — realised profit by acting employee

post.description: Supervisor or admin creates a fund. Triggers an account-service call to provision the fund's RSD account.
Creates a new bank account for a client. Requires accounts.create permission.

put.description: Updates the daily/monthly/transfer limits for a bank account. Requires accounts.update permission.
Updates the display name of a bank account. Requires accounts.update permission.

post.description: Activate a new account using the token from the activation email link
Authenticate with email and password, returns access and refresh tokens
Revoke the refresh token to end the session
Reset password using a token from the reset email link
Send a password reset link to the user's email
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access/refresh token pair
Resend the activation email for a pending account. No-op if the account is already activated.

get.description: Returns all bank-owned accounts. Requires bank-accounts.manage permission.

post.description: Creates a bank-owned account for fee collection. Requires bank-accounts.manage permission.

delete.description: Deletes a bank-owned account. Requires bank-accounts.manage permission. Fails if it's the last RSD or last foreign currency bank account.

get.description: Returns all bank margin configurations for variable-rate loans. Requires interest-rates.manage permission.

put.description: Updates the bank margin for a loan tier. Requires interest-rates.manage permission.

get.description: Returns all limit blueprints, optionally filtered by type

post.description: Creates a new named limit blueprint

get.description: Returns a single blueprint by ID

put.description: Updates an existing blueprint's name, description, or values

delete.description: Deletes a blueprint by ID (does not affect already-applied limits)

post.description: Copies blueprint limit values to the target entity (employee, actuary, or client based on blueprint type)
post.summary: Apply a blueprint to a target

post.description: Issues a new physical card for a client or authorized person. Requires cards.create permission.

get.description: Returns all card requests, optionally filtered by status. Requires employee authentication with cards.approve permission.

post.description: Client submits a request to get a card for one of their accounts. Requires client authentication.

get.description: Returns all card requests for the authenticated client.
Returns a single card request by ID. Accessible by both employees and the owning client.
get.summary: Get a card request by ID

post.description: Employee approves a pending card request, which creates the card. Requires cards.approve permission.
Employee rejects a pending card request with a reason. Requires cards.approve permission.

put.description: Blocks a card. Employees with cards.update permission can block any card. Clients can block their own cards via the client-authenticated endpoint.
Permanently deactivates a card. Requires cards.update permission.

post.description: Sets the 4-digit PIN for a card
Blocks a card temporarily for a specified duration in hours (1-720). Card is automatically unblocked when the duration expires.

put.description: Unblocks a previously blocked card. Requires cards.update permission.

post.description: Verifies the 4-digit PIN for a card. Card is blocked after 3 failed attempts.
Creates a new bank client with login credentials. Requires clients.create permission.

put.description: Updates client profile information. Requires clients.update permission.

get.description: Returns the transaction limits configured for a client

put.description: Sets the transaction limits for a client (employee only, constrained by employee limits)

get.description: Get paginated list of employees with optional filters

post.description: Create employee and send activation email. Requires employees.create permission.

get.description: Retrieve a single employee's details

put.description: Partially update employee fields. Cannot edit admin employees.

get.description: Returns the transaction and approval limits for an employee

put.description: Creates or updates the transaction and approval limits for an employee

parameters.description: Limit values (all amounts as decimal strings)
parameters.name: body

post.description: Copies a named template's limit values to the specified employee

put.description: Replaces the additional (per-employee) permissions for the given employee. Requires employees.permissions permission.
Replaces all roles for the given employee. Requires employees.permissions permission.

post.description: Returns the converted amount after applying the bank's selling rate and commission (informational only — no transaction is created)

get.description: Returns all current buy/sell rates for supported currencies against RSD
Returns buy/sell rates for a specific currency pair
Returns all configurable fee rules. Requires fees.manage permission.

post.description: Creates a new configurable fee rule. Requires fees.manage permission.

put.description: Updates an existing fee rule. Requires fees.manage permission.

delete.description: Deactivates a fee rule. Requires fees.manage permission. Cannot be undone except via update.

get.description: Returns all interest rate tier configurations. Requires interest-rates.manage permission.

post.description: Creates a new interest rate tier. Requires interest-rates.manage permission.

put.description: Updates an existing interest rate tier. Requires interest-rates.manage permission.

delete.description: Deletes an interest rate tier. Requires interest-rates.manage permission.

post.description: Recalculates interest for all variable-rate loans using a given tier. Requires interest-rates.manage permission.
post.summary: Apply variable rate update to active loans

get.description: Returns all predefined limit templates

post.description: Creates a new named limit template (admin only)

get.description: Returns all loan requests with optional filters. Requires credits.read permission.
Returns a single loan request. Requires credits.read permission.

put.description: Approves a pending loan request and creates the loan. Requires credits.approve permission.
Rejects a pending loan request. Requires credits.approve permission.

get.description: Returns the full profile of the authenticated user (client or employee).

Returns every balance-affecting event on the account in reverse-chronological order. Includes securities buys/sells (`reference_type=order`), tax collection (`reference_type=tax`), commission debits, transfers, payments, and interest. Ownership enforced against the JWT.
get.summary: List activity on one of my accounts

403.description: account does not belong to caller

post.description: Creates a virtual card owned by the authenticated client (single_use or multi_use, 1-3 month expiry). owner_id in the body is ignored — the gateway derives the owner from the JWT.
post.summary: Create virtual card for authenticated client

404.description: account does not belong to caller

get.description: Returns the OrderTransactions that contributed to a holding — when each buy/sell executed, price per unit, native vs account currency, FX rate, commission, and which account was used. Replaces the per-purchase detail removed from /me/portfolio in Part C.
get.summary: List per-purchase history for a holding

parameters.description: Filter by direction (buy|sell); empty for both
parameters.name: direction

404.description: not_found — holding does not exist or does not belong to caller

get.description: Returns recent login attempts for the authenticated user
List persistent notifications for the authenticated user (paginated, filterable by read status)

parameters.description: Filter by read status: 'read', 'unread', or omit for all
parameters.name: read

post.description: Marks all unread notifications as read for the authenticated user

get.description: Returns the number of unread notifications for the authenticated user

post.description: Marks a single notification as read for the authenticated user
Validates forex-specific constraints (forex must be buy, requires base_account_id, base_account_id must differ from account_id).
post.summary: Place a securities order (stock/futures/forex/option) for the authenticated user

parameters.description: Order. security_type is optional ('stock'|'futures'|'forex'|'option'); required for forex validation. base_account_id is required for forex buy orders.
parameters.name: body

400.description: validation_error — forex orders must be direction=buy; forex orders require base_account_id; base_account_id must differ from account_id

post.description: Creates a pending payment and automatically sends a verification code to the client's email.

get.description: Returns all active sessions for the authenticated user

post.description: Revokes all sessions except the current one (identified by the provided refresh token)

get.description: Returns paginated capital gains tax records and tax balance for the authenticated user (client or employee).

post.description: Creates a pending transfer and automatically sends a verification code to the client's email.
Returns commission fees and exchange rate data for a transfer without creating it.

get.summary: Get biometric verification status for device

post.summary: Enable or disable biometric verification for device
Transfer device (deactivate current + send new activation code)

post.description: Marks an inbox item as delivered so it no longer appears in future polls.
post.summary: Acknowledge a delivered mobile verification notification

404.description: Item not found or already delivered

post.description:
Verifies a pending challenge using the device's biometric authentication.
No request body needed - the device signature IS the proof of authentication.
Requires MobileAuthMiddleware + RequireDeviceSignature.
v2 takes option_id directly. If holding_id is omitted, the backend auto-resolves the user's oldest long option holding.
post.summary: Exercise an option by option ID (v2)

post.description: v2 accepts the option_id directly; internally resolves to listing_id and delegates to the standard order flow.
post.summary: Create an order for an option contract (v2)

post.description: Employee-only. Requires orders.place-on-behalf permission. Gateway verifies the account belongs to the named client; stock-service records acting_employee_id for audit.
post.summary: Place stock/futures/forex/option order on behalf of a client

post.description: Employee-only. Requires orders.place-on-behalf permission. Gateway verifies the account belongs to the named client.
post.summary: Buy an OTC offer on behalf of a client

get.description: Returns all payments (sent or received) for all accounts belonging to a client. Clients can only view their own payments.
Returns all permission codes with descriptions and categories. Requires employees.permissions permission.
Returns all roles with their associated permission codes. Requires employees.permissions permission.

post.description: Creates a new role with the given permission codes. Requires employees.permissions permission.

get.description: Returns a single role with its permission codes. Requires employees.permissions permission.

put.description: Replaces all permissions for the given role. Requires employees.permissions permission.

get.description: Returns all users with their capital gains tax debt for the current month. Requires tax.manage permission.

post.description: Collects capital gains tax from all users for the current month. Requires tax.manage permission.

get.description: Lists all accounts (employee read). Filter by ?account_number=X for exact-match lookup, or by name/type filters. To list a single client's accounts, use GET /api/v3/clients/{id}/accounts.

post.description: Marks the account as active. Idempotent. Requires accounts.deactivate permission (status changes cluster under deactivate).

get.description: Returns all cards for a given account ID. Resolves account_number from ID via account-service.
Returns paginated audit-log entries for a bank account.

post.description: Marks the account as inactive. Idempotent. Requires accounts.deactivate permission.

get.description: Returns payments for a given account ID. Resolves account_number from ID via account-service.
Returns paginated audit-log entries for a payment card.
Returns all accounts for a given client. Mounted under /clients/:id/accounts.
Returns all cards for a given client. Mounted under /clients/:id/cards.
Returns paginated audit-log entries for a bank client.
Returns all loans for a given client. Mounted under /clients/:id/loans.
Returns all payments for a given client. Mounted under /clients/:id/payments.
Returns all transfers for a given client. Mounted under /clients/:id/transfers.
Returns paginated audit-log entries for an employee.
Lists all loans (employee read). Filter by loan_type/account_number/status. To list one client's loans, use GET /api/v3/clients/{id}/loans.
Returns paginated audit-log entries for a loan.

delete.description: Revokes a session by ID, logging out the device associated with it. ID comes from the URL path; ownership enforced by the caller's JWT.

post.description: Foreign-prefix receivers return 501 not_implemented while the SI-TX implementation is being built. Intra-bank receivers (own 3-digit prefix) delegate to the standard transfer flow.
post.summary: Create a transfer (intra-bank only during SI-TX refactor)

get.description: Delegates to the intra-bank GetMyTransfer handler. UUID-style transaction IDs return 404 since the inter-bank lookup path is temporarily removed.
get.summary: Get a transfer by ID (intra-bank only during SI-TX refactor)
Get an OTC offer with revisions

post.description: Grants a single permission to the role identified by ID. The permission is validated against the codegened catalog. Idempotent — granting a permission already held is a no-op. Requires roles.permissions.assign permission.
post.summary: Assign a permission to a role

400.description: validation error or permission not in catalog

delete.description: Removes a single permission grant from the role identified by ID. Idempotent — revoking a permission not held is a no-op. Requires roles.permissions.revoke permission.
delete.summary: Revoke a permission from a role

post.description: Wipes all stock-service securities and trading state, then reseeds from the new source. Admin-only.

get.description: Returns the currently active stock data source, seeding status, and any error details.
get.summary: Get the current stock data source and status

client_id.description:
ClientID is accepted from the body for backwards compatibility but silently
ignored — the gateway always derives the client identity from the JWT principal_id.

owner_id.description: ignored by gateway; owner is derived from JWT
